tasks.label: iho: fetch DisplayBase sample ENC
tasks.command: mkdir -p target/iho-cache && curl -fsSL -o target/iho-cache/S-64_1.2.0.zip "https://github.com/iho-ohi/S-164-Sub-Group/releases/download/v1.2.0/S-64_1.2.0.zip" && unzip -p target/iho-cache/S-64_1.2.0.zip 'S-100/DisplayBase/S100_ROOT/S-101/DATASET_FILES/10100AA_DBASE.000' > target/iho-cache/sample_enc.000 && ls -la target/iho-cache/sample_enc.000
tasks.detail: Downloads IHO S-64 v1.2.0 zip and extracts one S-101 cell for ecdis-ui.

tasks.label: rust: run ecdis-ui (release, iho-cache sample)
tasks.detail: No debugger — run Slint UI in integrated terminal.
